intake.user_request: Audit every field on IndexingResult + IndexingStatistics + IndexingError against its paired invariant test. Fields with no invariant test are candidates for removal or freezing. Output: minimum-surface IndexingResult that satisfies all existing invariant tests and rejects additions without paired tests.

classification.plan_type_rationale: Schema audit (Phase 1 read-only) must be gated before any field removal or freezing (Phase 2). Phase 2 is a hard stop requiring Phase 1 audit matrix to be complete and reviewed before any interface change.

in_scope: Paired invariant test audit per field
Removal or freezing of fields with zero invariant test coverage
out_of_scope: ChunkConverter or --slim CLI flags (NOT in scope)
Any additive field changes (DR-PHASE-7-B locked-additive: remove/freeze only)

constraints: DR-PHASE-7-B locked-additive: this WO may REMOVE or FREEZE fields only — no new fields
AC-05a frozen fixture: chunksSkipped(header_status_missing) === element-grain count from graph.json fixture must PASS at close
AC-05b frozen fixture: uniqueFiles(skipDetails).size === validation_report.header_missing_count must PASS at close
chunksSkippedDetails MUST be preserved — AC-05a/05b tests access result.chunksSkippedDetails directly
